invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.description: Send an invitation to join your organization. They'll receive an email with a link to accept.
invite.limitReached: You've reached your team member limit.

pending.title: Pending Invitations
pending.revokeDescription: This will cancel the invitation sent to {email}. They won't be able to join your organization with this link.

members.title: Team Members
members.removeDescription: This will remove this member from your organization. They will lose access to all data and features.
